publicReleaseDecision.reason: The product direction is open source, so the simplest public distribution surface is this source repository. A separate artifact repository is unnecessary unless the source repository must remain private.

approvedClaims: The intended public release surface is the source repository itself.
A fresh clone can start local learning through the explicit command wrapper once repository visibility is public.
Local marketplace packaging and isolated CODEX_HOME install are verified.
First-run support diagnostics and non-destructive repair guidance are verified.
blockedClaims: Unauthenticated public HTTPS clone is not verified until repository visibility is public and the default public clone smoke passes.
Public Git-backed plugin install is not verified.
Realtime voice and real learner outcome claims remain outside the first-complete release claim.

common: Resolve #90 by choosing the public source repository surface and publication authority.
Run a smoke that proves the chosen surface is reachable without private source repository access.
Update README, STATUS, ISSUE-INDEX, dashboard, and GitHub issue state.
publicSourceRepository: Run the default public clone smoke without ENGLISH_LEARNING_ALLOW_PRIVATE_CLONE_SMOKE.
Add a public Git-backed install smoke before documenting Git-backed plugin install.
publicArtifactRepositoryRelease: Use this path only if the source repository must remain private.
Publish the artifact and SHA256SUMS from a separate public artifact repository release after explicit owner approval.

Run ENGLISH_LEARNING_PUBLIC_ARTIFACT_URL and ENGLISH_LEARNING_PUBLIC_SHA256SUMS_URL through scripts/phase7-public-release-url-smoke.mjs until hostedAccessStatus=public_url_candidate, checksumVerified=true, and canClosePublicDistribution=true.
Keep the verified install claim limited to local marketplace install from the checksum-verified downloaded artifact unless a separate public Git-backed install smoke passes.
publicStaticArtifactUrl: Publish the artifact and SHA256SUMS to the approved public static URL after explicit owner approval.

Run ENGLISH_LEARNING_PUBLIC_ARTIFACT_URL and ENGLISH_LEARNING_PUBLIC_SHA256SUMS_URL through scripts/phase7-public-release-url-smoke.mjs until hostedAccessStatus=public_url_candidate, checksumVerified=true, and canClosePublicDistribution=true.
Document the static URL host, retention owner, and update procedure before claiming public distribution.

claimBoundary: This policy prepares an open-source public source repository release. It does not claim unauthenticated public release until repository visibility is public and the default public clone smoke passes.
